chatMessages.content: Welcome to the galaxy Beta Test, banzz1918! The Galactic Federation welcomes you to Space Station, wishes you a great success in your journey, and appreciates to have you in our ranks. Remember, completing tasks inside your Commander Academy (Station Roadmap) is vital to stabilize the station, each task has claimable rewards with some Space Gold rewarded too! Also, please feel free to send us your thoughts and feedback via the Suggestion Station located in your Settings tab. Good luck, Commander!

logs: --- SATELLITE INTERCEPT ENCOUNTER ---
Hostile garrison detected: 772 defending HP.
Scout group attack rating: 600 attack HP.
Orbit guards identified scout telemetry and initiated railguards.
Our missile launcher group (5 unit(s)) was completely destroyed because our scouting attack power was less than hostiles' defending HP.
Full tactical satellite telemetry was successfully beamed to moonbase before demolition.
--- COMBAT CYCLE 1 INITIATED ---
Attackers throw Fleet Combat Strength of 1,149 into target coordinates.
Defenders respond with Planetary Defense Strength of 2,193 total DEF.
Combat Ratio: 1.91x advantage for the Defender.
Mathematical casualty curves applied to distribute force attrition evenly across all units.
Attacker casualties: 13 Interceptor, 21 Assault Drone, 3 Disrupter, 9 Matter Extractor, 1 Missile Launcher.
Defender casualties: 9 Interceptor, 16 Assault Drone, 2 Disrupter, 7 Matter Extractor.

No active orbit guards or garrison troops detected at target colony.
Complete layout telemetry logged with zero drone losses.
